recommendations.title: The Challenge
recommendations.overview: Estranged twins Lizzie and Shane are chosen for a Survivor-like popular game show with college scholarships as the prize.

recommendations.title: Winning London
recommendations.overview: When Chloe and Riley Lawrence are invited to London to participate in the international Model U.N. competition, they enjoy seeing the sights and head over heals romance with cute british boys of course.

recommendations.title: Dr. Dolittle: Million Dollar Mutts
recommendations.overview: Maya Dolittle can talk to animals. She gets discovered and Tiffany Monaco, a Hollywood star, brings her to L.A. to help her little puppy, who turns out to be a boy.

recommendations.title: Love Jacked

recommendations.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2

recommendations.title: Doraemon: New Nobita's Great Demon - Peko and the Exploration Party of Five
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Nobita is followed by a stray dog on his way home and decides to help it find its original owner with the help of Doraemon. They find out that the dog is actually a prince in its homeland in Africa.

recommendations.title: Unwelcome

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
recommendations.overview: When Maya, a headstrong little bee, and her best friend Willy, rescue an ant princess, they find themselves in the middle of an epic bug battle that will take them to strange new worlds and test their friendship to its limits.
